A.evidence: Every display equation is dropped as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' and epsilon is scrambled to 'glyph[epsilon1]'; Table 1 and Table 2 are merged into one garbled grid with broken rows/cols.

B.evidence: Real $$...$$ LaTeX equations and well-structured Algorithm/Table 1 tables, but inline math is cluttered with 'x$\_{0}$' subscript notation and the 'First, we set Σθ...' sentence in 3.2 is dropped.

C.evidence: Clean faithful prose with correct inline $...$ and display LaTeX equations (eqs 1-14) and proper reading order, but Table 1 and Table 2 are omitted even though the text runs past their page-5 location.

D.evidence: High-fidelity numbered LaTeX with bold \mathbf vectors matching the paper, but littered with '<span id=...>' anchors and reference hyperlinks, and the algorithms are flattened into a run-on paragraph instead of a two-column table.
